description: White background with an allover tropical island map print. The islands are outlined in red with yellow accent contour lines, set over dense turquoise wave-like scribble lines, with small blue palm trees and sailboats scattered throughout. Red handwritten-style words including “ALOHA,” “SEA,” “PALM ISLAND,” “PARADISE ISLAND,” and “BLUEMINT ISLAND” are printed inside and around the island shapes.

White background with an all-over beach postcard and stamp-style print in red, blue, green, and navy. The pattern mixes crabs, palm trees, surfboards, tropical leaves, and island silhouettes with printed words like “ALOHA,” “SUMMER VIBES,” “SUN&SEA,” “BEACH TIME,” “SEA LIFE,” “TROPICAL,” “COASTAL,” and “Bon Appetit.” Distinctive elements include the outlined postage-stamp frames, circular badge motifs, and repeated travel-label shapes scattered across the shorts.

Light aqua blue background with an allover sea-life pattern of stylized fish silhouettes. The fish are drawn in navy, red, and white with mixed details like stripes, zigzags, polka dots, and patchwork-like spots, plus scattered wavy blue water lines across the fabric.

White base with an allover icy blue polar scene print. The pattern features large blue-outlined penguins standing on snow and small seal-like animals scattered between sketchy horizontal ice and water lines, creating a hand-drawn arctic landscape look.

Mint/aqua background with an allover white wavy maze-like line pattern. Covered in repeated gray-and-white sharks outlined in black, with a matching aqua drawstring and a small white back patch featuring the word “BLUEMINT.”

Light blue background with an allover polar bear pattern in cobalt blue linework. The print shows bears in multiple poses—sitting, standing, walking, and lying down—mixed with sketchy blue ground/shadow strokes that give it a hand-drawn illustrated look.

White background with an allover polar bear print in pale aqua and mint tones. The bears are shown in mixed standing, sitting, and walking poses, outlined with thin dark lines for a sketch-like look. A small rectangular printed label reading “BLUEMINT” appears near the back pocket.

White background covered in a dense all-over print of ocean-themed badge and stamp shapes. The pattern features blue and turquoise sharks, whales, waves and a yellow octopus, with red and yellow outlined patches and visible text including “Ocean Wilderness,” “Marine,” “Dive Club,” and “Shark.”

Light aqua/mint background with an allover oversized paisley pattern. The print mixes coral pink, red, lime yellow, and green outlined teardrop swirls with sketchy aqua linework, creating a busy hand-drawn look.

Bright yellow background with an allover pattern of cobalt blue flamingos layered over thick white maze-like geometric squiggle lines. The standout look comes from the bold blue bird silhouettes in varied poses against the high-contrast yellow-and-white abstract backdrop.

Bright turquoise-blue background with an allover mix of pink flamingos and bold white maze-like geometric squiggles. The flamingos have dark navy beaks and legs, creating a vivid tropical contrast against the graphic white abstract pattern.

Bright sky-blue background with an allover Mediterranean coastal print. The pattern mixes white-and-red seaside buildings and domes, orange-red crabs and lobsters, shells, lemons, bottles, boats, and yellow-green leafy sprigs, with handwritten-style blue text such as “Amore,” “La Cucina,” “La Dolce Vita,” “Capri,” and “Beach.”

Bright aqua-blue background with an allover panda print in white, black, and gray. The pattern is layered with dark navy and blue bamboo leaves and thin crisscross line accents, creating a busy tropical-animal look.

Dark navy background with an all-over polar bear pattern in pale blue and white. The print features repeated standing, sitting, and walking bear silhouettes outlined in light blue, creating a dense high-contrast animal motif.

White base with an all-over coral-red geometric Greek key/maze pattern. The repeating angular interlocking lines cover the entire shorts, creating a bold high-contrast look, finished with a white drawstring at the waistband.

Bright red background with an allover flamingo print. The pattern features white flamingos outlined in dark navy/black, scattered in different standing poses over distressed horizontal white brushstroke bands.

Dark navy background with an allover elephant pattern in dusty pink. The elephants are shown in side profile and filled with intricate decorative linework, creating a distinctive repeated animal motif across the shorts.

Dark navy blue background with an all-over shark pattern. The sharks are large and cartoon-like in coral red, white, and black outlines, scattered in different directions across the fabric. Small white handwritten-style “Bluemint” text appears between the sharks, adding an extra printed detail.

Light aqua blue background with a playful allover Mediterranean/Italian travel sketch print. The pattern mixes pink crabs, orange-yellow lobsters, pastel buildings and domes, green leaves and citrus slices, striped seashells, bottles and cocktail glasses, with handwritten words like “Amore,” “Ciao,” “La dolce vita,” and “Italia” in blue script.
